comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review before implementation: confirm whether Next.js 14 remains the target version or should be updated to the current project standard.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review model choice: confirm current embedding model, pricing, and quality target before build start.

paragraphs.text: Build the resume upload worker: PDF/DOCX parsing -> structured JSON -> text-embedding-3-small embedding.
Build the resume upload worker: PDF/DOCX parsing -> structured JSON -> text-embedding-3-small embedding.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review dependency timing: confirm LinkedIn's current API approval lead time and access requirements.

paragraphs.text: LinkedIn API access; allow 4-6 weeks for approval because this may sit on the critical path.
LinkedIn API access; allow 4-6 weeks for approval because this may sit on the critical path.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review security claim: validate through authorization tests and penetration testing, including direct API calls and replay attempts.

paragraphs.text: Gate: The DISCOVERED -> PENDING_APPROVAL flow works end to end, and the Sender cannot fire without APPROVED in the database.
Gate: The DISCOVERED -> PENDING_APPROVAL flow works end to end, and the Sender cannot fire without APPROVED in the database.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review privacy and product policy: confirm retention window, token budget, and whether this context policy is appropriate for all tiers.

paragraphs.text: Store conversation history per session, using the last 20 turns as context.
Store conversation history per session, using the last 20 turns as context.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review threshold: confirm the 40% alert threshold against baseline behavior after beta data is available.

paragraphs.text: Add monthly drift-detection cron checks that alert when agent edit rate exceeds 40%.
Add monthly drift-detection cron checks that alert when agent edit rate exceeds 40%.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review performance target: reconcile this load-test target with the MVP Definition of Done target of p95 below 300 ms.

paragraphs.text: Run k6 load tests for 500 concurrent users with p95 latency below 500 ms.
Run k6 load tests for 500 concurrent users with p95 latency below 500 ms.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review accessibility standard: confirm whether WCAG 2.1 AA is sufficient or whether the launch bar should use WCAG 2.2 AA.

paragraphs.text: All P0 pages pass a WCAG 2.1 AA audit.
All P0 pages pass a WCAG 2.1 AA audit.

comments.author: Codex
comments.text: Review performance target: confirm this is realistic for all API endpoints and consistent with Phase 5 load testing.

paragraphs.text: API p95 response time is below 300 ms under 500 concurrent users.
API p95 response time is below 300 ms under 500 concurrent users.
